text.title: claude-messages-api Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract for claude-messages-api. Defines required fields, forbidden patterns, and worked valid + invalid examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: Every call site passes max_tokens explicitly.
Image content precedes text in user array.
Delta parser routes text vs input_json vs thinking.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Sort arrays deterministically by their natural key.

example.code: { "stop_reason_centralised": true, "max_tokens_explicit": true, "multimodal_image_first": true, "pdf_preflight_check": true, "metadata_user_id": true, "streaming_delta_aware": true, "model_id": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "forbidden_seen": [] }
example.note: All forbidden patterns absent; required fields populated.

example.code: { "stop_reason_centralised": false, "max_tokens_explicit": false, "multimodal_image_first": false, "pdf_preflight_check": false, "metadata_user_id": false, "streaming_delta_aware": false, "model_id": "claude-sonnet-4", "forbidden_seen": [ "f1", "f2", "f3", "f4", "f5" ] }
example.note: Every forbidden pattern triggered — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
